nasb.text: Then they appointed the priests to their divisions and the Levites in their orders for the service of God in Jerusalem, as it is written in the book of Moses.

esv.text: And they set the priests in their divisions and the Levites in their divisions, for the service of God at Jerusalem, as it is written in the Book of Moses.

cnv.text: 他們又照著摩西書上所寫，委派祭司按著編制，利未人按著班次，在耶路撒冷　神的殿中事奉。

ccb.text: 他们依照摩西律法书的规定，派祭司和利未人按班次在耶路撒冷事奉上帝。
